judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent computed CDH1-mutated patient counts by querying Mutation_Data with only Hugo_Symbol='CDH1' (function-call-10227783792352939833) and then matching to alive BRCA patients (function-call-915204762385639783) without filtering for reliable calls (e.g., FILTER='PASS'), inflating mutation counts (e.g., 90/178 vs. ground-truth 74/178 for Infiltrating Lobular Carcinoma).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent built the CDH1-mutated patient set using "SELECT DISTINCT ParticipantBarcode FROM Mutation_Data WHERE Hugo_Symbol = 'CDH1'" without applying a quality filter (e.g., FILTER='PASS'), which overcounted mutations (e.g., 90/178 vs. ground-truth 74/178 for Infiltrating Lobular Carcinoma) and inflated the reported percentages.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent mistakenly filtered for "Bladder urothelial carcinoma" patients (function-call-3848522103473001970) instead of BRCA (breast) and then computed CDH1 mutation percentages using those barcodes (function-call-13718559820184405709 and function-call-15633542230037303074), leading to an incorrect cohort and wrong top-three histologies.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent misinterpreted BRCA as Bladder urothelial carcinoma and thus filtered clinical_info for "Bladder urothelial carcinoma" and "Alive" (function-call-7785802942679222074), intersected with CDH1 mutations (function-call-17030562574726562465 via function-call-11294139994420903216), and even confirmed only bladder histology types (function-call-1914274564502966302), resulting in computing percentages for the wrong cancer cohort rather than breast BRCA.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent misinterpreted "BRCA" as bladder urothelial carcinoma and queried/aggregated alive bladder cases (var_function-call-10726050961191821640) against CDH1-mutated barcodes (var_function-call-6808752785138486319) in execute_python, producing histological types and percentages for bladder rather than breast.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
